title: tanacetum virgatum
intro: Tanacetum virgatum, commonly known as Tansy or Fringed Tansy, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used for centuries in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include acting as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic. The health benefits of Tanacetum virgatum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum virgatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its use is often cautioned due to potential toxicity and allergic reactions.
